## The 3-Question Pre-Check
<!-- Complete this BEFORE submitting. If any answer is NO — do not submit. Log directly in failure log. -->

### Question 1 — Has anyone in Egypt seen this before?
<!-- Check all five. If ANY is Found — do not submit. -->

| Platform | Result |
|---|---|
| Jumia Egypt | [ ] Clean &nbsp; [ ] Found — STOP |
| Noon Egypt | [ ] Clean &nbsp; [ ] Found — STOP |
| Facebook Marketplace Egypt | [ ] Clean &nbsp; [ ] Found — STOP |
| Instagram Egypt | [ ] Clean &nbsp; [ ] Found — STOP |
| Google Lens (reverse image) | [ ] Clean &nbsp; [ ] Found — STOP |

**Question 1 result:** [ ] ALL CLEAN — continue &nbsp; [ ] FOUND — do not submit

---

### Question 2 — Does the AHA happen in 3 seconds without a word?

Imagine it on a shop counter. Stranger walks past. Do they stop and pick it up?

- [ ] YES — clearly, without prompting
- [ ] UNSURE — treat as NO, do not submit
- [ ] Only after explanation — do not submit

**My AHA reaction (be specific — what did you feel when you saw it?):**


**Which of the 4 AHA reactions does it trigger? (minimum 2 required)**
- [ ] "How did no one think of this before?"
- [ ] "I need this right now"
- [ ] "I have to show someone this"
- [ ] "This looks expensive but it's not"

**Question 2 result:** [ ] 2+ reactions — continue &nbsp; [ ] Fewer than 2 — do not submit

---

### Question 3 — Can I make this in Egypt at real margin?

**Producibility:**
- [ ] Describable to workshop in one sentence
- [ ] Materials from green-list only (MDF / acrylic / aluminum / fabric / foam / standard hardware)
- [ ] Zero electronics, zero injection molding, zero imported core
- [ ] Maximum 6 assembly steps, workshop produces in 1–2 days

**One-sentence workshop description:**
> "Make me a ___________"

**COGS estimate at batch 30:** ______ EGP
*(Target: ≤80 EGP standard path / ≤120 EGP Semi-DIY)*

**Question 3 result:** [ ] ALL PASS — submit &nbsp; [ ] Any NO — do not submit

## Seasonal Context (Amplifier — NOT a gate)
